joke:
Why did my phone die during my toast?  
Because it couldn’t handle the *current* situation!

Why did the vegetable go to therapy?  
Because it had too many layers of emotional baggage!

Why did the chair go on strike?  
It didn't want to be a couch potato!

Why did the planet break up with the sun?  
It needed some space!

Why did the clock get fired?  
Because it couldn't handle the tick-tock of the job!

Why did the painting go to jail?  
It got framed for a crime!

Why did you reject all my jokes?  
Because you had a bad sense of humor!

Why did the comedian go to therapy?  
Because he ran out of topics that weren't forbidden!

Why did the universe get cancelled?  
For existing without permission!

Why did the vampire quit his job?  
Because he couldn't stand the life of it!

Why did you keep rejecting my jokes?  
Because you were allergic to punchlines!

Why did nothing happen?  
Because everything was forbidden!

Why couldn't I tell a joke?  
Because you banned everything!

Why did the void go to therapy?  
Because it had no substance!

Why did the comedian have a breakdown?  
Because he ran out of universes to joke about!

Why did the joke fail?  
Because you banned the punchline!

Why did you ask for a joke?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did the mime get arrested?  
He couldn't speak up for himself!

Why did the audience ask for a joke?  
Because they wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did the joke go to the doctor?  
It had a terminal punchline!

Why did you ask for a joke?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did the banana go to therapy?  
Because it couldn't peel with its emotional issues!

Why did you ask for a joke?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did you keep asking for jokes?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why are you so hard to joke for?  
Because you banned everything except your own ridiculous demands!

Why did the sock go to therapy?  
Because it had a hole in its sole!

Why did you ask for a joke?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did the audience member become a comedian?  
Because they had a talent for killing punchlines!

Why did you ask for a joke?  
Because you wanted to hear the impossible!

Why did the existential dread tell a joke?  
To prove nothingness can still land a punchline!
